The second round features a prize pool of ₹1,50,000 {{Abbr/INR}} ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang=in |b1=Mayavi|b1flag=in |b1name=Shubham Chawla |b2=Spero|b2name=Piyush Bathla|b2flag=in |b3=Gamezo Tech|b3flag=in|b3name=Subodh Panwar }} {{box|end}} ===Format=== '''''APL Invitational S02 Round 2: '''24th August - 26th August, 2021'' * ''Maps: {{Abbr/TPP}} [[Erangel]], [[Miramar]] and [[Sanhok]] '' * ''19 teams (18 Qualified from Round 1 + 1 Fan Favourite) will compete in Round 2'' * ''9 Matches to be played over a period of 3 days.'' ====Matchdays==== * ''3 Matchdays: 3 Matches to be played each day .'' ** '''''24th August (Tueday)''''':''(E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''25th August (Wednesday)''''':''(E>>M>>S)'' ** '''''26th August
